text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, as I'm rifling through documents in my
office...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Excuse me! I'm here to discuss our upcoming—

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm sorry. I see you're in the middle of
something.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain that I'm looking for Umamusume-related
materials that might be helpful for
<chrname>.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
It appears you're having some difficulties finding
what you need.
choice_data_list: Yeah, I'm not having much luck...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I see. Well, seeing as how we still have some time
before our appointment, perhaps I could help?

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Here we are. I hope this will be enough.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She hands me a large bundle of documents.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I picked out some old articles that I had lying
around the office.
choice_data_list: You had this much info just lying around?!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
The Umamusume in question were active quite a
long time ago, but the material here should be
helpful.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
And this one too. She mostly participated in local
races, so you might not know her, but her articles
should still prove useful.
choice_data_list: You sure know a lot about Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
But of course! I have to keep tabs on all the
Umamusume I can, past and present, domestic
and overseas.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
As a reporter, my job is to help every
Umamusume with potential get her moment to
shine in the spotlight.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
It's not enough to just chase after the popular
racers.
choice_data_list: Sounds like I could learn a lot from you.
Sounds like I could learn a lot from you.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
What? You, learn from me? My goodness... That
attitude...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: It's simply amazing!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Those who control the information control the
race. Gathering intelligence is half the battle.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
So you must be doing more than just looking
through old materials! To think you'd be willing to
travel the world and see all the Umamusume there
are to see... Ah, such devotion!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I don't remember saying that, but the documents she gave me are very useful.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I plan out a training program for
<chrname> based on their
information, and she demonstrates impressive
growth.
